title: KV cache fill during the decode loop
description: Prefill writes K/V for the whole prompt in one pass; each decode step appends one row and attends over everything cached. Step timeline with controls.

title: Transformer block dataflow
description: Pre-norm block: RMSNorm → attention → residual add → RMSNorm → SwiGLU MLP → residual add. Animated flow lines, hover-to-inspect caption.

title: Attention pattern: prefill vs decode
description: Causal attention matrix: prefill fills prompt rows in one batched pass, decode adds one row per step. Step timeline with controls.

title: Effects sampler — pastel palettes
description: Living documentation: all seven catalog effects (glow, sweep, comet, draw-in, ripple, shimmer, flash) running in both the pastel-on-dark and pastel-light palettes, with swatch legends.

title: The training loop: forward, loss, backward, update
description: One optimization step in pastel-on-dark: forward comets through the layer chain, loss glow, backward gradient comets, weight-update ripples. Step timeline with controls.

title: The NVIDIA GPU software stack
description: Five layers from frameworks and containers down to the RTX 5090 silicon: cuDNN, CUDA toolkit, driver and kernel modules. Hover-to-inspect with per-layer verify commands.

title: Dual-SSD storage layout for AI workloads
description: OS drive vs data drive mounted at /mnt/ai-data: models, datasets, caches, workspace, and the cache symlinks that keep home lean. Pastel-light, hover-to-inspect.

title: The OS setup pipeline, in order
description: Eight-stage setup order from Ubuntu install to Docker with the NVIDIA Container Toolkit, each stage tagged with its automation script and reboot points. Step timeline with controls.

title: Three sandboxes, two questions
description: Comparison grid of the inference, training, and agent sandboxes: what each workload must write, where it must talk, GPU access, and lifecycle — over a shared hardening floor. Hover-to-inspect.

title: Inference network topology and hardening
description: Localhost-only port bindings crossing into the ai-network bridge, three hardened inference containers, and the read-only model mount. Hover-to-inspect.

title: The per-job training sandbox lifecycle
description: One training job end to end: compose run --rm creates the hardened container, mounts attach, the job runs on the reserved GPU, checkpoints land on the writable training root, the container is removed. Step timeline with controls.

title: Agent sandbox egress flow
description: The agent on an internal network with no internet route, the Squid proxy as the only door, and the allow/deny verdict per request. Step timeline with controls.

title: Three engines, one workstation
description: Grid comparing llama-cpu, llama-gpu, and vllm-gpu: hardware, optimization target, image build style, and entrypoint pattern. Hover-to-inspect.

title: llama-cpu: the multi-stage build pipeline
description: Shared trixie-slim base, Zen 5 toolchain, SHA-pinned llama.cpp, AVX-512 cmake configuration, and the minimal runtime stage. Step timeline with controls.

title: llama-cpu entrypoint: env vars to server flags
description: Required, defaulted, feature-flag, and advanced env var groups feeding the CMD_ARGS bash array, ending in exec. Hover-to-inspect.

title: llama-gpu: devel to runtime, and the stub trick
description: CUDA devel builder with sm_120 flags and the stub libcuda, the runtime stage receiving only the binary, and the host driver arriving at run time. Hover-to-inspect.

title: llama-gpu entrypoint: env vars to server flags
description: Base config, GPU offload knobs, feature flags, and the NSYS_PROFILE wrapper assembling the GPU server command. Hover-to-inspect.

title: vllm-gpu: the build that retired
description: The retired from-source sm_120 build versus the current single-stage cu130 wheel install with pinned uv and FlashInfer. Hover-to-inspect.

title: vllm-gpu entrypoint: env vars to vllm serve
description: MODEL_PATH as the single required variable, VRAM and batching defaults, precision selectors, and the assembled vllm serve command. Hover-to-inspect.

title: The ambiguity ladder: six levels of contextual underdetermination
description: Hover the linguistic hierarchy from lexical to pragmatic, plus the LLM-specific structural dependencies that run alongside every level.

title: Winograd toggle: one verb re-points a pronoun
description: Switch a single verb and watch the pronoun's information-need arc move between two antecedents.

title: Sense pinning: context chooses what "bank" means
description: Toggle the preceding sentence and watch one distant word pin the sense of "bank", with an information-need arc to the disambiguating cue.

title: POS flip: fruit flies like a banana
description: Switch between the two grammars of the same five tokens: flies as noun or verb, like as verb or preposition, brackets re-drawing per reading.

title: Subword fusion: the model never sees the word
description: Step timeline: unbelievable splits into three meaningless fragments, binds to its neighbors, and re-assembles as one concept across three positions.

title: Polysemy web: the related senses of "paper"
description: Hover the sense hub: material, newspaper, article, exam radiating from a shared conceptual core — relatives, not homonymy's colliding strangers.

title: Homograph voicing: the audio cue text never carries
description: Toggle "lead" between /lɛd/ metal and /liːd/ news-lead contexts; the listener lane hears the sense, the model lane sees four letters.

title: Idiom binding: when the unit of meaning is bigger than the token
description: Toggle "kicked the bucket" between the compositional decoy and the idiomatic reading, where three tokens fuse into one unit meaning died.

title: Entity flip: Turkey the country, turkey the dinner
description: Sentence-initial "Turkey was dry." with a context toggle flipping entity-hood — capitalization is forced at sentence start, so it carries no signal.

title: Domain tint: the document decides what "positive" means
description: The same sentence inside an oncology note and a product review; diffuse arcs show the register of the whole document pinning the sense.

title: Cataphora: the pointer arrives before its target
description: Step timeline of a causal model reading “Before she left, Mary locked the door.” — the mask slides right, “she” stays unresolved until “Mary” arrives and the arc draws backward.

title: Definite descriptions: which one is “the animal”?
description: “The animal” must pick between a mentioned dog and cat; toggling the sentence's ending re-points the description via world knowledge.

title: Bridging reference: the referent was never mentioned
description: “I entered the room. The ceiling was high.” — the reference routes through a dashed part-of knowledge node back to “room”; chips switch among ceiling, windows, door.

title: One-anaphora: “the red one” copies in a missing noun
description: Toggle reveals the elided noun as a ghost token after “one”, with a copy-in arc from “shirt” in the previous utterance.

title: Demonstrative scope: how much does “that” point at?
description: “That was a mistake.” — a bracket over the previous sentence grows from one act to the whole decision; the referent's size is the ambiguity.

title: Zero anaphora: the referring expression that is not there
description: Spanish pro-drop: “¿Y María? — Llegó tarde.” — a dashed empty-slot token carries the arc back to María; the referent has no surface token at all.

title: Coreference chain: four names, one entity
description: Step timeline threading “Dr. Smith → she → the doctor → her” across a paragraph, ending in one entity node with four aliases.

title: PP-attachment: where does “with the telescope” hang?
description: Toggle between verb and noun attachment for “I saw the man with the telescope” — brackets and information-need arc re-draw between the two structures.

title: Coordination scope: are the women old?
description: Toggle the grouping of “old men and women” — the adjective's scope bracket re-draws and membership cards show who inherits it.

title: Garden path: the parse that has to be torn up
description: Step timeline of the incremental parse of “The horse raced past the barn fell” — commitment, contradiction at “fell”, and visible reanalysis to the reduced relative.

title: Agreement at a distance: the verb must skip the distractor
description: Toggle an intervening singular distractor into “The keys (to the cabinet) are on the table” — the agreement arc stretches over the flagged attractor.

title: Role assignment: who did what to whom
description: Active ⇄ passive toggle for “The dog bit the man” — AGENT and PATIENT tags stay with the participants while surface order flips.

title: Filler-gap: a phrase waiting for its position
description: “Which book did you say Mary thought John read __?” — the fronted phrase carries a pending badge until the gap site is revealed two clauses downstream.

title: Ellipsis: the predicate that isn't there
description: Reveal toggle materializing the elided material in VP-ellipsis (“Mary can __ too”) and sluicing (“I don't know who __”) with copy-in arcs.

title: Modifier scope: what does “only” attach to?
description: Toggle slides the scope bracket of “only” in “I only ate the cake” between the verb and the object; glosses cross-fade.
